description: Strategic Analyst agent for Phases 1-2. Scans repos and offers next steps.
UX Designer agent for Phases 3-4. Checks prerequisites and offers next steps.
Stakeholder buy-in pitch and service agreement. Skip if building your own product.
Define product vision positioning and success criteria. Every design decision traces back to this.
Map business goals to user psychology. Create personas and score features against driving forces.
Technical boundaries: platforms devices integrations constraints. Skip for simple landing pages.
Define user journeys as persona+goal+outcome. Each connects to a Trigger Map driving force.
Fast rough visual exploration before detailed specification. Skip for straightforward scenarios.
Sequence the user journey through screens with entry points transitions and error paths. Skip for simple scenarios.
Document every design decision for every element on every page. Developers build directly from this.
Extract reusable patterns from specs into component definitions. Skip if Design System Mode None.
Transform specs into styled HTML prototypes with Figma round-trips.
Manage component library and design tokens. Skip if Design System Mode None.
Validate specs are complete and package as DD yaml files for development handoff.
Iterative build-verify cycle with design log tracking and browser verification.
Test on real users in their environment with retrospective think-aloud sessions.
Continuous improvement: feedback to Trigger Map to spec update to code to verify.
